description: 1. Supple, good feel of the ball2. Bouncy on all surfaces due to butyl bladder, cotton and polyester filling3. Made to last with 32 machine-stitched panels, 4-ply polyester/viscose laminate4. Ball feel TPU coverThis kipsta branded football is durable and a great one to use in football matches and tournaments. The ball will forever be on your feet!
